hero_sub: We're looking for players who love the game, compete hard, and want to grow — on and off the field.
date_detail: Register below and we'll reach out with all the details once the date is confirmed. Tryouts will be held in Lawrence, KS.
philosophy: The Haymakers are a development-first program. We're not just looking for the most talented players — we're looking for kids who are coachable, show up with effort, and want to be part of something bigger than themselves. Development comes first. Effort is non-negotiable. Respect is required at all times.
